message.content: Now let me set up the stage tracker and immediately delegate to the requirements agent:

function.arguments: {"command": "plan", "stage_list": [{"id": "S1", "name": "Requirements + Spec + Padframe + Advisory", "status": "in_progress", "owner": "mcu_factory_requirements", "notes": "Parse MSPM33C321A derivative brief: 512KB flash, 128KB SRAM, -1 ADC, +1 I2C. Run MCU Factory Spec Advisory."}, {"id": "S2", "name": "Verification Planning", "status": "planned", "owner": "mcu_factory_verification_planning", "notes": "Build checklist + scenario YAMLs from spec/requirements."}, {"id": "S3", "name": "Generation (nc_chipgen generate)", "status": "planned", "owner": "mcu_factory_generation", "notes": "Run nc_chipgen generate with all scenario files."}, {"id": "S4", "name": "Verification Execution (nc_chipgen verify)", "status": "planned", "owner": "mcu_factory_verification", "notes": "Run nc_chipgen verify --all --coverage."}, {"id": "S5", "name": "Verification Review + Dashboard + Advisory", "status": "planned", "owner": "mcu_factory_verification_reviewer", "notes": "Review evidence, update checklist, run MCU Factory Verification Review Advisory."}, {"id": "S6", "name": "Physical Design (PnR)", "status": "planned", "owner": "chipgen_pnr", "notes": "Place-and-route, GDS generation, signoff."}]}
function.name: stage_tracker

function.arguments: {"agent": "mcu_factory_requirements", "task": "Parse the MSPM33C321A derivative user brief and produce all Stage 1 artifacts: requirements.md, spec.md, padframe_requirements.md, soc_config.yaml, and the MCU Factory Spec Advisory output.", "inputs": {"project_root": "/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526", "user_brief_path": "/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/docs/user_brief.md", "design_name": "mspm33c321a_deriv", "reference_device": "TI MSPM33C321A (Arm Cortex-M0+ @ 80MHz, 1MB Flash, 2x 12-bit ADC)", "derivative_deltas": {"flash_kb": 512, "sram_kb": 128, "adc_instances_delta": -1, "i2c_instances_delta": 1}, "required_outputs": ["/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/docs/requirements.md", "/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/docs/spec.md", "/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/docs/padframe_requirements.md", "/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/config/soc_config.yaml", "/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/docs/advisory/spec_advisory.md"], "advisory_instructions": {"step": "You MUST call list_advisories and find the advisory with EXACT name 'MCU Factory Spec Advisory'. Run it and save the raw output to docs/advisory/spec_advisory.md. If the advisory is not found, return FAILED with the missing advisory name explicitly stated.", "exact_advisory_name": "MCU Factory Spec Advisory"}, "acceptance_criteria": ["soc_config.yaml must reflect: flash=512KB, sram=128KB, adc_count reduced by 1, i2c_count increased by 1", "padframe_requirements.md must include GPIO count and power pad requirements", "docs/advisory/spec_advisory.md must exist and be non-empty", "All 5 required output files must exist"], "scope_note": "This is an intentionally small derivative change. All other MSPM33C321A peripherals, clocking, and subsystem architecture remain unchanged. The derivative targets cost reduction via flash halving, one fewer ADC, and adds one I2C instance. SRAM is INCREASED to 128KB as a design improvement in the derivative."}}
function.name: delegate_to_agent

stage_list.name: Requirements + Spec + Padframe + Advisory
stage_list.notes: Parse MSPM33C321A derivative brief: 512KB flash, 128KB SRAM, -1 ADC, +1 I2C. Run MCU Factory Spec Advisory.

stage_list.name: Verification Planning
stage_list.notes: Build checklist + scenario YAMLs from spec/requirements.

stage_list.name: Generation (nc_chipgen generate)
stage_list.notes: Run nc_chipgen generate with all scenario files.

stage_list.name: Verification Review + Dashboard + Advisory
stage_list.notes: Review evidence, update checklist, run MCU Factory Verification Review Advisory.
